title: The 72-Hour Rule That Stops $31,000 in Impulse Buys
hook: Millionaires don't have more willpower — they use one rule that makes impulse buying almost impossible.
angle: Reframes impulse control as a brain-science hack, not a willpower battle — with a specific technique anyone can start using tonight
audience: Millennials and Gen Z frustrated by overspending and living paycheck to paycheck despite decent incomes
key_numbers: $31,000 in regretted impulse buys every decade
87% of items never purchased after the 72-hour wait
